headline: Iron Mountain (IRM) Price Target Increased to $140 by Truist
summary: Iron Mountain Inc. (NYSE:IRM) is one of the Best Digital Infrastructure REITs to Buy According to Analysts. On May 1, Truist analyst Tobey Sommer raised the price target on Iron Mountain to $140 from $130 while maintaining a Buy rating on the shares following better-than-expected first-quarter financial results, according to a report by TheFly.
